title: Death Locator
description: A server side mod that shows your position on death chat messages.
body:
**Death Locator** will simply show your cordinates on death along the death message.

Works with vanilla clients.

![An example showing a death message in game with the player cordinates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tCOFZpRX/images/d86f663775ab3ee4e6d6cfddb39182c177775778.png)
